title: query range colums partition report error
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
```sql
CREATE TABLE test1 (
ID VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '主键',
PARTITION_NO INT(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '分区',
CREATE_TIME DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
PRIMARY KEY (ID,PARTITION_NO,CREATE_TIME) USING BTREE,
INDEX index_partition_no (PARTITION_NO) USING BTREE
)
COMMENT='测试表'
ENGINE=InnoDB
PARTITION BY RANGE COLUMNS(PARTITION_NO,CREATE_TIME)
(PARTITION 2023p1 VALUES LESS THAN (200000,'2023-01-01'),
PARTITION 2023p2 VALUES LESS THAN (300000,'2023-01-01'));
select * from test1 where partition_no >= 200000;
```
<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
query success
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
```sql
[15:06:24]TiDB root:test> select * from test1 where partition_no >= 200000;
(1105, 'interface conversion: interface {} is nil, not types.Time')
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test2 (ID INTEGER NOT NULL, NAME TEXT, PARTITION_NO INTEGER NOT NULL, CREATE_TIME DATETIME NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (ID, PARTITION_NO, CREATE_TIME));
INSERT INTO test2 (ID, NAME, PARTITION_NO, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 50, '2022-12-31 10:00:00');
INSERT INTO test2 (ID, NAME, PARTITION_NO, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (2, 'Bob', 150, '2023-01-01 12:00:00');
SELECT * FROM test2 WHERE PARTITION_NO >= 100 AND CREATE_TIME < '2023-01-01 12:00:00';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test2 WHERE PARTITION_NO IS NULL OR CREATE_TIME IS NULL;
key_bug_features: PARTITION BY RANGE COLUMNS with multi-column condition
